creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
We define struct ip as having an alignment of 2, so it feels wrong to try and handle the case where it has odd alignment.  There may well be other code paths where we (or the compiler) is making assumptions about header alignment, and we have no good way to test.

So, since this issue hasn't really gotten attention in the 10+ years since it was submitted, I'm going to go ahead and close this.
